author: alex-jadecli
body:
**ci-firefighter**: classified as **outcome-gate failure** (pre-rubric: missing required artifacts, not a low-score dimension).

The `outcome-gate` job failed at the gate's first check:

> `outcome-gate: PR introduces no outcome+report pair. Every PR must add outcomes/<slug>.outcome.json and outcomes/<slug>.report.json.`

Failing run: https://github.com/opensubagents/outcomes/actions/runs/26265843848/job/77308766996

**Why this is the "weakest dimension":** there is no rubric score to weaken — t
